original.query: I’m setting up a brainstorming session in a writing app where I need the assistant to switch between a few different “voices” to stress-test ideas and then output everything in a rigid template. Given what you know about the kind of approach I tend to like, what setup (persona mix + structure) should I choose so it feels most natural to me?
